title: Invite Participant
description: Invite staff, guests or election committee members to {organisation}.

form.title: Send Invitation
form.message_placeholder: Add a short note to accompany the invitation…

info_panel.title: Participant types
types: Staff — internal team members with operational access
Election Committee — members who oversee election integrity
process: Enter the email address and select a type
The recipient receives an email with a secure link
They click the link and are added as a participant
info_panel.note: Note: invitations can only be sent by admins and owners.
